summary: Audited the tender family and found a real runtime boundary mismatch: action_tender_bid is visible to project_read roles including finance, but the tender.bid model grants no read access to project_read, so the family cannot be classified as clean.

notes: This is a real runtime residual, not a sample shortage.
Finance can currently see the tender action but cannot read the target model.
A narrow follow-up batch is required to align action_tender_bid with tender.bid read ownership.

next_step: Stop the chain and open a narrow governance or implementation batch to align action_tender_bid with tender.bid read ownership.
